utterances.text: Having that ready, you know, a.

utterances.speaker: Vrijen Attawar
utterances.text: You know, my demo, my deck, my stuff, like, you know, your one liner, your blurb, all of that, like, having those components ready to distribute and to take advantage of that opportunity almost matters the most.

utterances.speaker: Vrijen Attawar
utterances.text: And then that way, it becomes, again, in a football analogy, it's like, are you taking more shots on goal?

utterances.speaker: Vrijen Attawar
utterances.text: And you have to figure out a what type of Striker.

utterances.speaker: Vrijen Attawar

utterances.speaker: Vrijen Attawar
utterances.text: You know, low volume, high conversion.

utterances.speaker: Vrijen Attawar
utterances.text: Some people's natural networking style, like my natural networking style lends itself to really deep relationships with people.

utterances.speaker: Vrijen Attawar
utterances.text: But that's hard because you can do.

utterances.speaker: Vrijen Attawar
utterances.text: Because I volume wise, meet a lot of people.

utterances.speaker: Vrijen Attawar
utterances.text: And so part of my challenge as a networker has been how do I change that?

utterances.speaker: Vrijen Attawar
utterances.text: How do I use AI to make this large pool of people seem small and help me develop deeper relationships with.

utterances.speaker: Vrijen Attawar
utterances.text: And there's stuff you can do around that.

utterances.speaker: Vrijen Attawar
utterances.text: Like there's a really cool tool called Zoe that just launched today that I'm a brand ambassador of.

utterances.speaker: Vrijen Attawar
utterances.text: So I'll show you one of the things that I was literally doing this morning with Zoe that relates to networking.

utterances.speaker: Vrijen Attawar
utterances.text: Hold on, I'll show you this.

utterances.speaker: Vrijen Attawar
utterances.text: And so I just did a poll today where I've set it up to pull from this product called Aviato that's basically an API for humans is what they call it.

utterances.speaker: Vrijen Attawar
utterances.text: But it's like Apollo, it's like searchable, like biographical information.

utterances.speaker: Vrijen Attawar
utterances.text: I literally just said, hey, I'm giving you this image which was like this image of like this image of an event that I've been invited to.

utterances.speaker: Vrijen Attawar
utterances.text: I was like, pick a random name and like enrich it with Aviato.

utterances.speaker: Vrijen Attawar
utterances.text: And like it was able to, because I've set it up, it has like a profile created, right.

utterances.speaker: Vrijen Attawar
utterances.text: And now when I meet this person, not only do I have a profile for them ready in my CRM, right.

utterances.speaker: Vrijen Attawar
utterances.text: Like you can see over here.

utterances.speaker: Vrijen Attawar
utterances.text: I also am like, I have it set up so that every time I interact with them, it's going to update this file.

utterances.speaker: Vrijen Attawar
utterances.text: So how can you use AI to do things?

utterances.speaker: Vrijen Attawar
utterances.text: So it's like, it's not that I'm sending cold emails, right?

utterances.speaker: Vrijen Attawar
utterances.text: So it's like everyone's instinct is to use AI to depersonalize the process.

utterances.speaker: Vrijen Attawar
utterances.text: And my question is, how can we use AI to hyper personalize the process?

utterances.speaker: Vrijen Attawar
utterances.text: Because the utility is when I speak to this person, I have the right information to like make a connection with.

utterances.speaker: Vrijen Attawar
utterances.text: And then it's about like, can I foster touch points?

utterances.speaker: Vrijen Attawar
utterances.text: So can I like set up like, okay, a reminder that like in three, three months, like, you know, for example, and I don't hear a lot of people talk about this, everyone's focused on like the making the connection.

utterances.speaker: Vrijen Attawar
utterances.text: That's where the real networking begins, is the relationship building and the cultivation.

utterances.speaker: Vrijen Attawar
utterances.text: And so I would say that would be the other.

utterances.text: Other advice is treat it like a diet and figure out, like, who are your.

utterances.speaker: Vrijen Attawar
utterances.text: Like, these are my contacts that I want to build a deep relationship with.

utterances.text: And those are like my, My, you know, sort of calories.

utterances.speaker: Vrijen Attawar
utterances.text: This is the people that I have to talk to or like, I have to do a certain amount of, like, networking to just like, move my career, my business forward.
